expressions.english: lunch time
waste of time
time to eat, time for eating
expressions.notes:
밥 = food; meal; cooked rice
먹다 = to eat; to drink

expressions.english: to spend time
to save time
to ask the time
to turn back the time
Do you have time?
Time's up.
expressions.notes: 시간이 다 됐어 = time is up

expressions.english: Please make some time for me.
expressions.notes:
시간을 내다 = to spare time; to make time
-아/어/여 주세요 = (polite) Please do + something + for me

expressions.english: I fell asleep in class.
expressions.notes:
수업 = class
졸다 = to doze off

expressions.english: I told you I don't have time.
expressions.notes: -잖아(요) is a sentence ending used most commonly when correcting another person's remark or when refreshing someone's memory.

expressions.english: When can you make some time?

expressions.korean: 한 시간 정도 걸릴 것 같아요.
expressions.english: I think it will take about an hour.
expressions.notes:
한 시간 = one hour
정도 = about, around
(시간이) 걸리다 = to take (a certain amount of time)

expressions.english: I will go to the bank during lunch time.
expressions.notes:
은행 = bank
다녀오다 = to go (to a place and come back)
-(으)ㄹ게 것이다 = will; be going to + V

expressions.english: How much time does it take to go from Seoul to Busan?
expressions.notes:
-까지 = until; to
몇 시간 = how many hours; a few hours

expressions.korean: 시간 가는 줄 모르고 수다를 떨었어요.
expressions.english: We chatted on without noticing the passage of time.
expressions.notes:
시간이 가다 = time passes
-는 줄 모르다 = to not know/notice + S + V
수다 = chatter
수다를 떨다 = to chatter

expressions.korean: 그 곳에 가는 건 시간 낭비라고 생각해요.
expressions.english: I think going there is a waste of time.
expressions.notes:
그 = the; that
곳 = place
가다 = to go; to leave
생각하다 = to think

expressions.korean: 지금 출발하면 거기까지 가는 데에 얼마나 걸릴까요?
expressions.english: If we leave now, how long do you think it will take to get there?
expressions.notes:
출발하다 = to depart
거기 = there, that place
-는 데(에) = in + V-ing, for + V-ing

expressions.korean: 시간을 되돌릴 수 있다면 초등학교 때로 돌아가고 싶어요.
expressions.english: If I could turn back time, I'd want to go back to elementary school.
expressions.notes:
-(으)ㄹ 수 있다면 = if one could + V
초등학교 = elementary school
돌아가다 = to go back; return
